diagrams.title: Insertion Sort Process
diagrams.description: Shows how Insertion Sort builds sorted portion from left to right by inserting each element into its correct position
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how sorted portion grows incrementally with each iteration

diagrams.title: Selection Sort Passes
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the selection of minimum element from unsorted portion and its placement at the beginning of unsorted portion
diagrams.purpose: Understand how sorted region grows from left while algorithm finds minimum each time

diagrams.title: Bubble Sort Bubbling
diagrams.description: Illustrates how largest elements 'bubble up' to the end of array with each pass through adjacent comparisons and swaps
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the upward movement of largest elements to their final positions

diagrams.title: Complexity Comparison Chart
diagrams.description: Table comparing Best/Average/Worst time complexities and space complexities across all three algorithms
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for comparing algorithmic efficiency and properties
